audit_items.proof_trace: The zero-price revert is directly implemented: `isZero = price == 0` at L404, followed by `if (withValidation) { if (isZero) { revert Errors.ZeroFeedData(); } }` at L409-412, unconditionally before any return. All bid()-path callers pass `withValidation=true` (L429 for assetIn, L798 for assetOut via _getAssetOutAmount called with true at L442), and the negative-value bypass is also blocked by SafeCast on int256→uint256 conversion at L392.
